quality.completeness: All standard fields (level, school, casting time, range, components, duration, description, classes) are present.
quality.clarity: The description is clear and mechanistically sound for its intended effect (linguistic universal translation).

mechanics.level_school_fit: Level 3 Divination is appropriate for a spell that significantly alters communication and perception.
mechanics.casting_time_range_duration: 1 action casting time, Touch range, and 1 hour duration are balanced for a utility spell of this level.
mechanics.components: Verbal (V) and Material (M) components are listed. The material component (a small clay model of a ziggurat) is flavor-rich but does not specify a monetary cost or if it is consumed, which is typical for non-consumed, flavor-based materials.
mechanics.class_availability: The spell is available to a good mix of arcane (wizard, sorcerer, warlock) and divine/support casters (bard, cleric), fitting its utility nature.

analysis.recommendations: None needed. The entry is well-formed and mechanically sound.
